rationale: ADR-023 created with all 5 required sections (Policy, Staged rollout, Waiver model, Fail-open, Recovery UX) at Proposed status; FEAT-004/010/011 amendments add the lint, quality-hooks, and nested-skill sections with proper cross-links; commit format and grep verification both pass.
